Dakota version 6.16 released May 16 2022.
Repository revision d68d94ff5 (2022-05-09) built Apr  1 2024 15:56:41.
Running MPI Dakota executable in serial mode.
Start time: Wed May 13 23:06:40 2026

-----------------------
Begin DAKOTA input file
dakota.in
-----------------------
# Dakota input file: hydroRaVENS Cannon River parameter calibration
# Generated by generate_dakota_in.py from params.yml — do not edit by hand.
#
# Active parameters (9):
#   log__t_efold_shallow: log10 shallow/overland-flow e-folding time [days]
#   log__t_efold_soil: log10 soil-zone e-folding time [days]
#   f_exfiltration_shallow: fraction of shallow exfiltration to stream (remainder recharges soil)
#   PDD_melt_factor: degree-day snowmelt rate [mm SWE / degC / day]
#   log__H0_pdm_shallow: log10 PDM characteristic storage depth [mm] — shallow reservoir
#   log__H0_pdm_soil: log10 PDM characteristic storage depth [mm] — soil reservoir
#   log__fdd_threshold: log10 frozen-ground-index threshold [degC·day]
#   f_tile_shallow: fraction of shallow-zone drainage routed to tile sub-reservoir
#   log__tau_tile: log10 tile-drain e-folding time [days]
# Fixed (inactive) parameters:
#   log__t_efold_karst = 3.5  (log10 karst/bedrock e-folding time [days] — not used in 2-res)
#   f_exfiltration_soil = 1.0  (fraction of soil-zone exfiltration to stream — fixed at 1.0 (bottom reservoir))
#   log__Hmax_shallow = 3.5  (log10 shallow-reservoir max effective depth [mm] — disabled; PDM used)
#   log__H0_pdm_karst = 2.3  (log10 PDM characteristic storage depth [mm] — karst (not used))
#   snow_insulation_k = 0.0  (snow insulation decay constant [mm⁻¹ SWE])
#   f_tile_soil = 0.0  (fraction of soil-zone drainage to tile — zero; soil is bottom in 2-res)
#   f_direct_runoff = 0.0  (fast-bypass fraction of daily recharge)
#   baseflow_Q = 0.0  (constant regional groundwater import [mm/day])
#   log__routing_K = 0.0  (log10 Nash-cascade storage time constant [days])

environment
  top_method_pointer = 'HYBRID'
  tabular_data
    tabular_data_file = 'dakota.dat'

method
  id_method = 'HYBRID'
  hybrid sequential
    method_pointer_list = 'EGO' 'PS'

method
  id_method = 'EGO'
  efficient_global
    gaussian_process surfpack
    initial_samples = 300
    seed = 12345
    output quiet
  model_pointer = 'M1'

method
  id_method = 'PS'
  coliny_pattern_search
    max_function_evaluations = 200
    convergence_tolerance = 0.0001
    output quiet
  model_pointer = 'M1'

model
  id_model = 'M1'
  single
    interface_pointer = 'I1'
  variables_pointer = 'V1'
  responses_pointer = 'R1'

variables
  id_variables = 'V1'
  continuous_design = 9
    descriptors   = 'log__t_efold_shallow' 'log__t_efold_soil' 'f_exfiltration_shallow' 'PDD_melt_factor' 'log__H0_pdm_shallow' 'log__H0_pdm_soil' 'log__fdd_threshold' 'f_tile_shallow' 'log__tau_tile'
    lower_bounds  =  0.3  1.0  0.01  0.1  1.0  1.0  0.0  0.0  0.0
    upper_bounds  =  2.0  2.7  0.99  10.0  3.5  3.5  3.0  0.99  1.146
    initial_point =  1.2  1.8  0.8  1.0  2.3  2.3  1.9  0.3  0.845

interface
  id_interface = 'I1'
  analysis_driver = 'bash run_driver.sh'
  fork
    parameters_file = 'params.in'
    results_file    = 'results.out'
    work_directory
      named 'out/run'
      directory_tag
      directory_save
    file_save
    copy_files 'driver.py' 'cannon_cfg_1991_2011_et_tc_2res.yml' 'Cannon1991-2011Input.csv' 'run_driver.sh' 'params.yml'
    asynchronous
      evaluation_concurrency = 4

responses
  id_responses = 'R1'
  objective_functions = 1
    response_descriptors = 'neg_kge'
  no_gradients
  no_hessians
---------------------
End DAKOTA input file
